plot outline: A Biopic on the life of the legendary American Astronaut Neil Armstrong from 1961-1969, on his journey to becoming the first human to walk the moon. Exploring the sacrifices and costs on the Nation and Neil himself, during one of the most dangerous missions in the history of space travel.
title: First Man
akas: ファースト・マン (Japan, Japanese title)
First Man: Le Premier Homme sur la Lune (France)
